ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene associated with the variant */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the variant's clinical significance and impact */,
  "clinical_importance" TEXT /* Clinical importance of the variant */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Level of evidence supporting the variant's clinical significance */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the variant (e.g., Pathogenic, Benign) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the variant in the population */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the variant */,
  "inheritance" TEXT /* Inheritance pattern of the variant */,
  "zygosity" TEXT /* Zygosity of the variant (e.g., Heterozygous, Homozygous) */,
  "PMIDs" TEXT /* PubMed IDs of associated publications */,
  "dbSNP_ID" TEXT /* dbSNP ID of the variant */,
  "penetrance_score" INTEGER /* Penetrance score of the variant */,
  "build_37_chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome number in build 37 */,
  "build_37_position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant in build 37 */,
  "build_37_variant_allele" TEXT /* Variant allele in build 37 */,
  "build_38_chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome number in build 38 */,
  "build_38_position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant in build 38 */,
  "build_38_variant_allele" TEXT /* Variant allele in build 38 */,
  "functional_impact_score" REAL /* Functional impact score of the variant */,
  "population_frequency_source" TEXT /* Source of the population frequency data */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of variant (e.g., SNV, Indel) */,
  "functional_annotation" TEXT /* Detailed functional annotation of the variant */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the variant validation */,
  "associated_drugs" TEXT /* Drugs associated with the variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the variant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "PMID" TEXT /* PubMed ID of the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_publications" (
  "variant_pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant-publication relationship */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_publications_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_publications_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Function of the gene */,
  "gene_ontology_terms" TEXT /* Gene ontology terms associated with the gene */,
  "gene_pathway" TEXT /* Pathway the gene is involved in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  "omim_id" TEXT /* Online Mendelian Inheritance in Man (OMIM) ID */,
  "disease_prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the disease in the population */,
  "disease_mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate associated with the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_diseases" (
  "variant_disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant-disease relationship */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_diseases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_diseases_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, bioinformatician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography or profile of the user */,
  "user_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the user (e.g., Genetics, Oncology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the variant */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the variant */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the annotation was last updated */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., Approved, Pending) */,
  "annotation_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the annotation (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant the sample is associated with */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., DNA, RNA) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g., patient, control) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the sample data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the sample data file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sample record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sample record was last updated */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., Available, Archived) */,
  "sample_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sample */,
  "sample_processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was processed */,
  "sample_storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the sample (e.g., freezer, room) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_samples_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)
